zh.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons是Fitzpons的兒子，於1038年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特。他於大約1062年與Béatrice de Ponthieu結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1086年在英國波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons是Fitzpons的儿子，于1038年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特。他于大约1062年与Béatrice de Ponthieu结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1086年在英国波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Pedro, Ramon, Guillermo, Roberto, Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Mario, Rafael, Apolonia.  French Adrien, Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Marcelle, Matilde.
Catalan, French (Occitan), and Dutch: from the medieval personal name Pons (see Ponce ).
German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name, such as Bonhard, formed with the element bon ‘request, petition’ (compare Latin bonus).

variants.name: Ponce
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Miguel, Pedro, Raul, Roberto.

Spanish and French: from the medieval personal name Ponce, ultimately from Pontius, a Roman surname, perhaps an ethnic name for someone from Pontus (named from Greek pontos ‘ocean’) in Asia Minor, or an Italic cognate of Latin Quintus ‘fifth’ (i.e. ‘fifth-born’). The name was borne by two 3rd-century Christian saints, a Carthaginian deacon and a martyr of Nice, but was not widely popular in the Middle Ages because of the inhibiting influence of the even more famous Pontius Pilate. In some cases though, the surname may have been originally used for someone who had played the part of this character in a religious play.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons was born in 1038, in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France as the son of Fitzpons. He married Béatrice de Ponthieu about 1062. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1086, in Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons est né en 1038, à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, fils de Fitzpons. Il a épousé Béatrice de Ponthieu environ 1062. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1086, à Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons wurde 1038 in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich, als Sohn von Fitzpons geboren. Er hat um 1062 Béatrice de Ponthieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1086 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons è nato il nel 1038 nel Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia come figlio di Fitzpons. Lui sposato Béatrice de Ponthieu circa 1062. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1086, nel Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPonsは1038年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントでFitzponsの息子として生まれた。約1062年にBéatrice de Ponthieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1086年にイギリスバークシュアイアエアトン ハスティングズで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons(은)는 1038년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에서 Fitzpons의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1062년 Béatrice de Ponthieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1086년 영국 버크실르 이턴 하스틴그스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons nasceu em 1038, em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França filho de Fitzpons. Ele casou-se com Béatrice de Ponthieu aproximadamente 1062. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1086, em Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons родился в 1038 г. в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. Его отца звали Fitzpons. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrice de Ponthieu около 1062 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1086 г. в местности эатон хастингс, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Pons FitzPons nació en 1038, en Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia como hijo de Fitzpons. Se casó con Béatrice de Ponthieu aproximadamente 1062. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1086, en Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
